title: [ARCHIVED] Vanilla Twenty
description: A lightweight and performant Trails and Tales 1.20 modpack focused on improving the vanilla experience through performance, shaders, small tweaks like trimmable weapons, improved biomes and loot tables and more. The best way to experience the new update.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/7vJUhps4dt) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459) 

### [If you enjoyed this pack, I highly suggest you check out Legacies instead](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacies)

Vanilla Twenty is a simple, lightweight vanilla+ modpack targeting the latest Minecraft version, designed to be the best way to play vanilla Minecraft, with a focus on optimisation, shader support and vanilla-styled texture improvements. Vanilla Twenty is the best way to experience the latest updates to Minecraft, with only a few small vanilla+ improvements added, designed to organically enhance and expand on the latest updates without adding much - typically just a few smaller mods that add changes that are almost indistinguishable from vanilla, but add to your experience of the game, such as trimmable armor tools and elytras, or some slight Wild Update-styled biome improvements. All changes are subtle, and add to the immersion and enjoyment of your world. 

- supports global multiplayer (hit Open To LAN and join from anywhere!)

- shader support, and included Vanilla+ shaders!

- highly optimised

- vanilla playthrough-friendly

- additional Sniffer features

- improved Spyglasses

- expanded archaeology with additional pottery sherds!

- revamped armor trim template recipes

- expanded copper

- dynamic lighting

- vanilla+ texture enhancements

- lightweight and always on the latest MC version

- trimmable tools and armor!

- bundle recipe

- small additions and biome improvements

- virtually indistinguishable from vanilla, in a good way!

- the best way to experience Vanilla and the Trails and Tales update!

### Host your own Server

If you're interested in playing Minecraft (with or without my mods) with your friends, I recommend you **[take a look at Kinetic Hosting!](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=55)**. For 5GB ram, they charge under $13USD a month for Performance, and under $6 for Budget, not including my discount code! I personally use their performance servers, and their specs, price, support and easy-to-use panel are the best of all the hosts I've been with. In addition, you can **[use code LEGACY for 15% off](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=55)** your first month!

<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

Yes, I am partnered with them (and a member of their feedback team), but as an already-existing customer of them (and have paid and still pay for their servers myself), I can legitimately say they're great, regardless of whether I'm partnered with them. They're just genuinely good, I know the support team, they're super friendly and quick. The server specs are as good as you can get, and importantly, they aren't overpriced, unlike other hosts - in fact, they're less than half the price of quite a few big competitors I've seen around here, with no downside! If you need a server, these guys truly know what you're doing, and will respect your wallet when they do it. If you buy a server through my link, you even help support my work!

</details>
